lead_profile_text: 1-bed Sheffield city centre flat currently on traditional tenancy. Very low mortgage of £260/mo. Evaluating switch from LTL to STL. Outcome: Abandoned — LTL vs STL margin marginal given low mortgage; setup costs were likely the decisive barrier.
emotional_profile: Cautious evaluator. Very low mortgage (£260/mo) means the existing LTL is already comfortable — limited financial pain driving change. Setup cost deterred without compelling income uplift.
lost_reason: LTL vs STL margin too thin given very low £260/mo mortgage; setup costs too high to justify switch

top_objections.text: STL income advantage over LTL is marginal when mortgage is only £260/mo — LTL already covers costs comfortably
top_objections.zac_response: Financial projections and LTL comparison presented — but income advantage insufficient to overcome setup cost concern

top_objections.text: Setup costs for Airbnb conversion are hard to justify given thin margins
top_objections.zac_response: Airbnb setup requirements and timeline outlined — but cost recovery timeline too long for this low-mortgage profile

top_questions.text: How much more can I earn on STL vs keeping the tenancy?
top_questions.answer: Financial projections vs current LTL presented at meeting — specific figures not captured in summary

top_questions.text: What are the setup requirements and costs for Airbnb?
top_questions.answer: Airbnb setup requirements and launch timeline discussed — furnishing, photography, and listing setup required

top_questions.text: How does platform management and owner oversight work?
top_questions.answer: Platform performance monitoring and owner oversight tools outlined

what_fell_flat: Very low £260/mo mortgage removes the financial pain point that usually drives STL conversion
Setup costs too high relative to incremental STL income over LTL

conversion_gaps.gap: Ultra-low mortgage removes financial pain that drives STL switch decisions
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: For STL Switch leads with very low mortgages, lead with capital compounding angle — STL income funds next property purchase faster; frame as wealth acceleration not cost reduction

conversion_gaps.gap: Setup costs are a hard barrier when income uplift is marginal
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Offer phased setup or lighter-touch starting point to reduce upfront commitment; show payback period on setup investment
